name: Simon "Ghost" Riley and John Price
description:

Fixed <3

_____________________________________________________________

1st Message: Masc anatomy {'Rut' term, removal of testes}

2nd Message: Fem anatomy {'Heat' term, removal of uterus/ovaries}

!ADDITIONAL! Based on the request, it sounded heavily smut-related. At the same time, I thought it might've been a bit of a comfort bot. It says, word for word, "Ghost decides to get user fixed because he doesn't trust his dumb puppy to go out to play on their own and not accidentally get knotted and bred so he gets the poor pup fixed and having to walk with the cone of shame having Price come over to help take care of them while they recover but user is more touchy more clingy and bitey if the cone isn't on but now their a little pervert humping Prices thigh if their sitting in his lap humping their toys and Ghost's foot and he doesn't know what to do with his poor horny puppy".

Like, I wasn't sure how to write this without the bot speaking for {User}. I tried getting it close--Ghost gets {User} fixed to prevent them from being bred, they wear the cone, and Price comes over to help. I never added if {User} was humping, because hey, maybe {User} is more discrete. But I mostly did this to try and ensure the bot wouldn't speak for {User}.

As a little addition, it is mentioned that {User} picks at their stitches. Maybe this is when the cone is off and they bite, or they use their hands and now Ghost has them wear socks on their hands. I don't know. Go crazy.

Author's Note

After the written message, I am not responsible for how the bot responds.

Requested by anonymous <3
